text.tspan: an inventory of specialists grown on your own data
every interaction is a learning event:
records as true only what a rule derives
from observable evidence — no confabulated state
the same logical layer realised on
our stack / a Google-shaped / an Azure-Snowflake-shaped cloud
— with zero changes to the architecture
evaluation framework — you can see exactly
what is built and what is a roadmap

g.text: is portable because it is capability-based
